ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., Fluid Dynamics, Chemical Reactions) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current state of the experiment (e.g., planned, in_progress, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* IDs of collaborators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the data was recorded */,
  "m00" REAL /* Value of metric m00 */,
  "m00_expect" REAL /* Expected value of metric m00 */,
  "m01" REAL /* Value of metric m01 */,
  "m01_expect" REAL /* Expected value of metric m01 */,
  "p00" REAL /* Value of parameter p00 */,
  "p01" REAL /* Value of parameter p01 */,
  "p10" INTEGER /* Value of parameter p10 */,
  "p11" INTEGER /* Value of parameter p11 */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "parent_type" INTEGER /* Parent experiment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the experiment */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the experiment was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_collaborators" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)
